title: phyllanthus neilgherrensis
intro: Phyllanthus neilgherrensis, also known as the Neilgherries tree or dwarf phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus neilgherrensis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-viral properties, which may help to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus neilgherrensis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including liver and kidney problems, and respiratory infections.
